## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` тАФ new feature
- [ ] `fix` тАФ bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` тАФ code change with no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` тАФ documentation only
- [ ] `chore` тАФ tooling / dependencies / CI
- [ ] `test` тАФ tests only

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested manually in the browser (if UI change)
